name: ConfirmPopup
description: ConfirmPopup displays a confirmation overlay displayed relatively to its target.

props.name: group
props.description: Optional key to match the key of the confirmation, useful to target a specific confirm dialog instance.

props.name: unstyled
props.description: When enabled, it removes component related styles in the core.

slots.name: message
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Message of the component */ message: ConfirmationOptions; }): VNode[]

slots.name: icon
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Style class of the icon template */ class: any; }): VNode[]
slots.description: Custom icon template. @param {Object} scope - icon slot's params.

slots.name: container
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Message of the component */ message: any; /** * Accept function of the component */ acceptCallback: () => void; /** * Reject function of the component */ rejectCallback: () => void; }): VNode[]
